emails.body: Re: Updated Line Pack Gas Purchase Agreement form provided by Vector. They appear to have made the changes that we requested. Do you want me to fill in the name of the Seller and print off 2 originals for signature. If not, please fill in the name and forward to me for initialling before the contract is signed by ENA.. Kevin Ruscitti 11/14/2000 12:01 PM
